messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个贪食蛇游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个贪食蛇游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>贪食蛇游戏</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        #gameCanvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        // 初始化Canvas
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏常量
        const GRID_SIZE = 20;
        const COLS = Math.floor(canvas.width / GRID_SIZE);
        const ROWS = Math.floor((canvas.height - 60) / GRID_SIZE); // 留出顶部空间给得分
        const OFFSET_Y = 60;
        const GAME_SPEED = 150; // 毫秒

        // 游戏状态
        const GAME_STATES = {
            MENU: 'menu',
            PLAYING: 'playing',
            PAUSED: 'paused',
            GAMEOVER: 'gameover'
        };

        // 游戏变量
        let gameState = GAME_STATES.MENU;
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('snakeHighScore') || 0;
        let snake = [];
        let food = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        let direction = { x: 1, y: 0 };
        let nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
        let lastUpdateTime = 0;
        let inputQueue = [];

        // 初始化游戏
        function initGame() {
            // 初始化蛇
            snake = [
                { x: Math.floor(COLS / 2), y: Math.floor(ROWS / 2) },
                { x: Math.floor(COLS / 2) - 1, y: Math.floor(ROWS / 2) },
                { x: Math.floor(COLS / 2) - 2, y: Math.floor(ROWS / 2) }
            ];
            direction = { x: 1, y: 0 };
            nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
            score = 0;
            spawnFood();
        }

        // 生成食物
        function spawnFood() {
            let validPosition = false;
            while (!validPosition) {
                food.x = Math.floor(Math.random() * COLS);
                food.y = Math.floor(Math.random() * ROWS);
                validPosition = true;
                // 检查是否与蛇重叠
                for (let segment of snake) {
                    if (segment.x === food.x && segment.y === food.y) {
                        validPosition = false;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // 更新游戏逻辑
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== GAME_STATES.PLAYING) return;

            lastUpdateTime += deltaTime;
            if (lastUpdateTime < GAME_SPEED) return;
            lastUpdateTime = 0;

            // 处理输入队列
            if (inputQueue.length > 0) {
                const newDir = inputQueue.shift();
                // 防止180度转向
                if (newDir.x !== -direction.x || newDir.y !== -direction.y) {
                    nextDirection = newDir;
                }
            }

            direction = { ...nextDirection };

            // 移动蛇
            const head = { x: snake[0].x + direction.x, y: snake[0].y + direction.y };

            // 检查碰撞
            if (checkCollision(head)) {
                gameState = GAME_STATES.GAMEOVER;
                if (score > highScore) {
                    highScore = score;
                    localStorage.setItem('snakeHighScore', highScore);
                }
                return;
            }

            snake.unshift(head);

            // 检查是否吃到食物
            if (head.x === food.x && head.y === food.y) {
                score += 10;
                spawnFood();
            } else {
                snake.pop();
            }
        }

        // 检查碰撞
        function checkCollision(head) {
            // 撞墙
            if (head.x < 0 || head.x >= COLS || head.y < 0 || head.y >= ROWS) {
                return true;
            }
            // 撞自己
            for (let i = 1; i < snake.length; i++) {
                if (head.x === snake[i].x && head.y === snake[i].y) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            return false;
        }

        // 渲染游戏
        function render() {
            // 清空画布
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制背景
            const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = 'bold 20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 40, 30);

            // 绘制最高分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, 50);

            // 绘制游戏区域边框
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.strokeRect(0, OFFSET_Y, canvas.width, canvas.height - OFFSET_Y);

            if (gameState === GAME_STATES.MENU) {
                renderMenu();
            } else if (gameState === GAME_STATES.PLAYING || gameState === GAME_STATES.PAUSED) {
                renderGame();
                if (gameState === GAME_STATES.PAUSED) {
                    renderPauseMenu();
                }
            } else if (gameState === GAME_STATES.GAMEOVER) {
                renderGame();
                renderGameOverMenu();
            }
        }

        // 渲染游戏元素
        function renderGame() {
            // 绘制食物
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            ctx.shadowColor = '#ff6b6b';
            ctx.shadowBlur = 10;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(
                food.x * GRID_SIZE + GRID_SIZE / 2,
                OFFSET_Y + food.y * GRID_SIZE + GRID_SIZE / 2,
                GRID_SIZE / 2 - 2,
                0,
                Math.PI * 2
            );
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.shadowBlur = 0;

            // 绘制蛇
            for (let i = 0; i < snake.length; i++) {
                const segment = snake[i];
                const x = segment.x * GRID_SIZE;
                const y = OFFSET_Y + segment.y * GRID_SIZE;

                // 蛇头使用不同颜色
                if (i === 0) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
                    ctx.shadowColor = '#4fd1c5';
                    ctx.shadowBlur = 8;
                } else {
                    // 蛇身渐变
                    const alpha = 1 - (i / snake.length) * 0.5;
                    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(79, 209, 197, ${alpha})`;
                    ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
                }

                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.roundRect(x + 2, y + 2, GRID_SIZE - 4, GRID_SIZE - 4, 6);
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
            }
        }

        // 渲染菜单
        function renderMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = 'bold 36px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('贪食蛇', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 60);

            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 空格键 或 点击屏幕 开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('使用方向键或WASD控制', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            ctx.fillText('按 P 或 Esc 暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 70);
        }

        // 渲染暂停菜单
        function renderPauseMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = 'bold 32px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 30);

            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 空格键 继续游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 20);
        }

        // 渲染游戏结束菜单
        function renderGameOverMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = 'bold 32px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 60);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.font = '24px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 10);

            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 30);

            ctx.font = '18px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 空格键 重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
        }

        // 输入处理
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (!pressed) return;

            switch (gameState) {
                case GAME_STATES.MENU:
                    if (key === ' ' || key === 'Enter') {
                        gameState = GAME_STATES.PLAYING;
                        initGame();
                    }
                    break;

                case GAME_STATES.PLAYING:
                    switch (key) {
                        case 'ArrowUp':
                        case 'w':
                        case 'W':
                            if (inputQueue.length < 2) {
                                inputQueue.push({ x: 0, y: -1 });
                            }
                            break;
                        case 'ArrowDown':
                        case 's':
                        case 'S':
                            if (inputQueue.length < 2) {
                                inputQueue.push({ x: 0, y: 1 });
                            }
                            break;
                        case 'ArrowLeft':
                        case 'a':
                        case 'A':
                            if (inputQueue.length < 2) {
                                inputQueue.push({ x: -1, y: 0 });
                            }
                            break;
                        case 'ArrowRight':
                        case 'd':
                        case 'D':
                            if (inputQueue.length < 2) {
                                inputQueue.push({ x: 1, y: 0 });
                            }
                            break;
                        case 'p':
                        case 'P':
                        case 'Escape':
                            gameState = GAME_STATES.PAUSED;
                            break;
                    }
                    break;

                case GAME_STATES.PAUSED:
                    if (key === ' ' || key === 'p' || key === 'P' || key === 'Escape') {
                        gameState = GAME_STATES.PLAYING;
                    }
                    break;

                case GAME_STATES.GAMEOVER:
                    if (key === ' ' || key === 'Enter') {
                        gameState = GAME_STATES.PLAYING;
                        initGame();
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }

        // 游戏循环
        let lastTime = 0;
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            const deltaTime = currentTime - lastTime;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, true);
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (gameState === GAME_STATES.MENU || gameState === GAME_STATES.GAMEOVER) {
                handleInput(' ', true);
            } else if (gameState === GAME_STATES.PAUSED) {
                handleInput(' ', true);
            }
        });

        // 初始化并启动游戏
        initGame();
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
